title: otiophora scabra subsp. diffusa
intro: Otiophora scabra subsp. diffusa, a plant species, is a subspecies of Otiophora scabra, a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is often used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Otiophora scabra subsp. diffusa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
